metadata.title: Halloway & Associates — Production Lab
metadata.description: AI, automation, and growth engineering studio. We build production-grade systems for ambitious companies across Morocco, Europe, North America, and the UAE.
metadata.keywords: AI automation|MVP development|growth engineering|revenue systems|Halloway & Associates|Production Lab|global delivery|n8n automation|Stripe integration

hero.title: We engineer systems that scale businesses.
hero.subtitle: Halloway & Associates is an AI, automation, and growth engineering studio. We design and ship production-grade workflows, products, and revenue systems — not slide decks.

pillars.label: Service pillars across our Production Lab

tracks.label: Focus tracks: Automation, Revenue, Growth, Product

regions.label: Global markets across Africa, Europe, and North America

mvpWeeks.label: Typical MVP delivery window for focused builds

thesis.title: Technology should compound — not accumulate chaos.
thesis.body: Most organizations stack tools without connecting them. We architect integrated systems: automation pipelines, AI layers, payment flows, and digital products that work together and scale with your business.

focusTracks.title: Four disciplines. One integrated studio.
focusTracks.subtitle: Every engagement draws from our Production Lab — modular capabilities that combine when your challenge demands it.

automation.title: Automation & AI
automation.description: End-to-end workflows, intelligent agents, and connected toolchains that eliminate manual handoffs.

revenue.title: Revenue systems
revenue.description: Stripe, subscriptions, invoicing, and offer engineering designed to capture and recover revenue.

growth.title: Marketing & growth
growth.description: SEO, funnels, content engines, and paid acquisition loops built as systems — not campaigns.

product.title: Product & MVP
product.description: Websites, SaaS platforms, and rapid MVPs with the architecture to grow beyond the first release.

servicesPreview.title: Fourteen capabilities. One standard: production-ready.
servicesPreview.subtitle: From n8n automation to MVP development — every service is engineered for reliability, clarity, and scale.

regions.title: Eight markets. One delivery standard.
regions.subtitle: We partner with teams across Morocco, Southern Europe, the United Kingdom, North America, and the UAE — on-site when it matters, remote when it scales.
regions.mapAriaLabel: Interactive world map of Halloway & Associates markets in Morocco, Europe, North America, and the UAE
regions.mapFootnote: Markers show our active markets. Dashed arcs indicate delivery routes from the selected market to the rest of our global network.
regions.mapAttribution: Map data: Natural Earth & world-atlas (public domain).

morocco.coverage: Casablanca, Rabat, and North African enterprise & growth mandates
morocco.note: Our Morocco practice supports automation, product builds, and growth systems for regional operators expanding across MENA and Europe.

greece.coverage: Athens, Thessaloniki, and EU-adjacent product & automation work
greece.note: Greece engagements focus on SaaS MVPs, workflow automation, and EU-market go-to-market systems.

spain.coverage: Madrid, Barcelona, and Iberian growth & revenue engineering
spain.note: We deliver payment systems, marketing automation, and product launches for Spanish and cross-border EU teams.

italy.coverage: Milan, Rome, and national automation & digital product programs
italy.note: Italy work spans CRM automation, AI assistants, and production-grade integrations for mid-market and enterprise clients.

uk.coverage: London, Manchester, and UK-wide product & growth engineering
uk.note: UK clients engage us for revenue systems, AI layers, and scalable web platforms with async-first delivery.

usa.coverage: East Coast, national SaaS, and US growth & automation programs
usa.note: US engagements run fully remote with structured discovery, sprint reviews, and production handoffs.

canada.coverage: Toronto, Montréal, and national Canadian product & automation mandates
canada.note: Canada remains a core market for bilingual delivery, provincial programs, and cross-border North American builds.

uae.coverage: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Gulf enterprise automation & product work
uae.note: UAE projects emphasize payment infrastructure, AI automation, and digital products for regional expansion.

cta.title: Ready to discuss what we could build together?
cta.subtitle: A 15-minute discovery call is enough to explore fit — no pitch deck required.

servicesPage.title: Every capability in our studio
servicesPage.subtitle: Filter by focus track or browse the full catalog. Select any capability to see how we deliver it.

ai-automation.title: AI + Automation Engineering
ai-automation.summary: n8n, Make, Zapier — CRM to sales to payment pipelines, fully connected.
ai-automation.details: We design end-to-end automation systems: lead routing, internal ops, finance workflows, and multi-tool integrations. Built for reliability, observability, and scale.

ai-chatbots.title: AI Chatbots & Intelligent Systems
ai-chatbots.summary: Website, WhatsApp, and social bots for sales, support, and follow-up.
ai-chatbots.details: AI assistants that qualify leads, answer support questions, and follow up 24/7 — across web, messaging platforms, and internal team tools.

payments.title: Payment & Revenue Systems
payments.summary: Stripe, subscriptions, invoicing, and failed-payment recovery.
payments.details: Checkout flows, SaaS billing, automated invoicing, and revenue recovery systems that reduce leakage without adding headcount.

content-social.title: Content + Social Media Automation
content-social.summary: Multi-platform posting, AI content workflows, and repurposing systems.
content-social.details: Turn one core asset into LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and email — with scheduling, tracking, and content strategy automation.

marketing-seo.title: Marketing, SEO & Growth Engineering
marketing-seo.summary: SEO, CRO, funnels, paid ads, and lead generation systems.
marketing-seo.details: Technical SEO, landing page optimization, conversion funnels, and growth loops engineered for measurable, repeatable acquisition.

web-mvp.title: Website, App & MVP Development
web-mvp.summary: Custom platforms, SaaS builds, and rapid product delivery.
web-mvp.details: From marketing sites to full SaaS products — modern UX, API integrations, admin dashboards, and marketplace architectures.

data-crm.title: Data, CRM & Business Intelligence
data-crm.summary: CRM setup, enrichment, segmentation, and KPI dashboards.
data-crm.details: HubSpot, Airtable, custom CRM migrations, lead deduplication, predictive analytics, and competitor intelligence automation.

community.title: Community Building & Engagement
community.summary: Discord, Circle, monetization, gamification, and retention systems.
community.details: Community platforms with engagement automation, paid access tiers, loyalty systems, and creator/influencer infrastructure.

branding.title: Branding, Content Strategy & Reputation
branding.summary: Positioning, authority building, storytelling, and reputation monitoring.
branding.details: Brand identity, founder personal branding, thought leadership systems, viral content strategy, and online reputation management.

consulting.title: Business Growth & Consulting
consulting.summary: GTM strategy, offer engineering, pricing, and expansion planning.
consulting.details: Business model redesign, market expansion, pricing optimization, and performance audits for scaling organizations.

startup-mvp.title: Startup MVP & Product Studio
startup-mvp.summary: 0→product builds, validation systems, and product-market fit experiments.
startup-mvp.details: Rapid 2–6 week MVP cycles, landing page validation, technical architecture, and structured PMF experimentation.

fundraising.title: Fundraising & Investor Preparation
fundraising.summary: Pitch decks, narrative engineering, projections, and demo prep.
fundraising.details: Investor-ready pitch materials, financial modeling, startup narrative design, and MVP demo preparation for fundraising.

training.title: IT Training & Digital Transformation
training.summary: Team upskilling on automation, CRM, and AI tools.
training.details: Workshops and training programs for n8n, Zapier, HubSpot, AI tooling, and digital transformation for teams and founders.

revenue-engineering.title: Revenue & Growth Engineering
revenue-engineering.summary: Funnel design, A/B testing, subscription models, and offer restructuring.
revenue-engineering.details: Conversion optimization, sales funnel architecture, pricing experiments, and subscription growth models for higher LTV.

aboutPage.title: A production lab for ambitious operators.
aboutPage.intro: Halloway & Associates is not a traditional agency. We are a technical studio that designs, builds, and integrates systems — automation, AI, revenue infrastructure, and digital products — with the rigor of an engineering team and the clarity of a strategic partner.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Transform ideas into fully operational, scalable, revenue-generating systems. We exist for founders and operators who need production-grade execution — not another vendor who disappears after the kickoff call.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: We map your operations, stack, and growth constraints. No assumptions — we validate before we build.

design.title: Design
design.body: Architecture, workflows, and UX defined with clear scope. You know exactly what ships and why.

build.title: Build
build.body: Production code, tested integrations, and documented systems — not prototypes that never reach production.

scale.title: Scale
scale.body: Monitoring, iteration, and expansion paths built in from day one.

modularity.title: Modularity
modularity.body: Every system is composed of isolated, maintainable modules — never monolithic black boxes.

production.title: Production-first
production.body: Error handling, logging, security, and observability are defaults — not add-ons.

honesty.title: Honest scope
honesty.body: We tell you what will work, what won't, and what to build first for maximum impact.

locations.title: Global markets
locations.subtitle: Active delivery across Morocco, Southern Europe, the United Kingdom, North America, and the UAE.

contactPage.title: Let's discuss your next system.
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your business and what you're trying to build. We'll respond within one business day.
